channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How Men Perceive Social Media
item.description: We feel guilty about not optimizing, but that guilt is just another obstacle to perfection we must overcome today.

item.title: Darializa Avila Chevalier Is an Enemy of the American Creed
item.description: Her vicious declarations are not something to be dismissed as mere foibles. They are the product of a diseased mind and must be repudiated.

item.title: Talladega Nights Retraces Our Tracks
item.description: Adam McKay’s classic farce about the deplorables.

item.title: Pentagon defends F-35 to lawmakers after questions from recent GAO report
item.description: The F-35 Lightning II is the Pentagon's most expensive single weapon system at $80 million to $100 million apiece, but analysts say the program hasn't...
